message:
refactor(abi): replace ElfLoader with direct ELF section parsing for pthread symbol resolution

Switch resolve_loaded_libc_symbol_direct() from the high-level ElfLoader
abstraction to manual ELF parsing using Elf64Header, parse_section_headers,
parse_symbols, and get_string. This walks the .dynsym and .dynstr sections
of the already-loaded libc.so.6 directly, providing finer-grained control
over dynamic symbol lookup and reducing dependency on the loader abstraction
layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
